summary: Iteration 28 — Adviser per-client read-only access (snapshot JSON + PDF review pack) tested end-to-end. 17/17 backend pytest cases pass; all critical frontend flows verified (linked column, disabled/enabled snapshot+PDF buttons, modal open with snapshot data, in-modal PDF download button, modal close).
critical_code_review_comments: link_client_by_email and link_client_household are idempotent (only touch rows where linked_user_id/linked_household_id is null) — safe to call repeatedly from signup/google-session/household flows. Correctly imported lazily inside server.py to avoid circular import.
_load_client_household correctly enforces adviser ownership (returns 404 if cid is not on this adviser's roster) BEFORE checking linked status — cross-adviser isolation verified.
client_not_linked path returns 409 with detail.error='client_not_linked' as specified.

PDF endpoint returns proper application/pdf content-type, %PDF- magic bytes, content-length >1500 (verified at 4400+ bytes), and content-disposition with attachment + filename pattern 'wayly-review-pack-*.pdf'. X-Wayly-Review-Pack header added too.
Snapshot endpoint updates adviser_clients.last_seen_at to the most-recent statement's uploaded_at — verified via follow-up GET /adviser/clients.
Frontend correctly uses axios responseType:'blob' with programmatic <a download> click for PDF download — no iframe assumption.
Modal overlay uses onClick={onClose} on outer overlay with stopPropagation on inner card — Adviser can dismiss by clicking the dimmed background OR the X close button. Both work.
All testids match spec: adviser-snapshot-modal, adviser-snapshot-close, adviser-download-pdf-modal, adviser-linked-{id}, adviser-client-snapshot-{id}, adviser-client-pdf-{id}.
MongoDB _id correctly excluded via projection {_id: 0} on all reads.
test_credentials: Adviser: mark.adviser@example.com / AdviserPass1!. Family: cathy@example.com / testpass123. Auto-linked signup uses fresh TEST_autolink_*@example.com per run.
seed_data_creation: Backend test creates throwaway adviser_clients rows + a fresh signup user per run and cleans them up in test_zzz_cleanup. Also creates a temporary second adviser (TEST_adv2_*) for cross-isolation tests. cathy's existing seeded household is used as the linked-household source.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_iter28_adviser_snapshot.py. Run with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL exported. Test data: roster is cleaned between runs. Note: the frontend test added 'cathy@example.com' as an adviser client during browser testing — leftover rows on mark.adviser's roster may persist (they will be cleaned/replaced by next backend test run). Coverage includes: auto-link on signup, auto-link on household, immediate-link on POST /adviser/clients for pre-existing users, snapshot 200/401/403/404/409 paths, PDF 200/401/403/404/409 + magic bytes + content-disposition, cross-adviser isolation (404), last_seen_at update.
